title: Venezuela rescuers in final push to find survivors as anger mounts

Meanwhile, anger is growing over the government's slow and limited aid in a country mired in a deep crisis that has driven millions to emigrate in recent years.

title: Meet your MEP! Behind the scenes of the European Parliament
description: You might know that the European Parliament is the only directly elected institution in the EU, and that it plays a crucial role as a co-legislator with the EU Council. But what does an MEP actually do? We meet three Belgian MEPs from contrasting political ideologies and parties. Through them, we explore some of the key European issues that they are working on.

title: French heatwave threatens food inflation as agriculture sector suffers

Also, the EU and China set an October deadline to make progress on trade disputes, while the ECB Chief Christine Lagarde says the Eurozone economy is resilient enough to withstand an end to exceptional monetary policy measures.

title: Ukraine's war-damaged power grid struggles under soaring heat

title: Final dash for documents as Spain triggers largest migrant amnesty in European history

title: Discover the winners of FRANCE 24's video competition on EU cohesion policy

title: Румыния купит у Израиля системы ПВО за более чем 2 миллиарда евро
description: Румыния договорилась с Израилем о покупке израильских систем ПВО SPYDER за сумму более чем два миллиарда евро. Об этом информирует газета Jerusalem Post.

title: Российские разработчики игр представят свои проекты на Tokyo Game Show и G-Star
description: Более 20 московских студий смогут показать свои разработки на международных игровых выставках Tokyo Game Show в Японии и G-Star в Южной Корее.

title: The Times of Israel: Израиль серьезно воспринимает слова Эрдогана
description: Израильская сторона также хочет обратить внимание США на высказывания турецкого лидера
